When Chuck Norris throws exceptions, it's across the room.
All arrays Chuck Norris declares are of infinite size, because Chuck Norris knows no bounds.

Chuck Norris doesn't pair program.

Chuck Norris doesn't need an OS.

Chuck Norris can compile syntax errors.

Chuck Norris does not code in cycles, he codes in strikes.
Chuck Norris compresses his files by doing a flying round house kick to the hard drive.
Chuck Norris solved the halting problem.

如果你覺得 Java 很棒只是因為它可以運行在所有的作業系統上，那你可能也會覺得肛交很棒？

多工 - 動詞；一次把好幾件事搞砸
一個好的工程師是那種過單行道馬路都要左顧右盼的人

我想大部分人都知道通常一名工程師會具有的美德；當然了，有三種：懶惰、暴躁、傲慢
寫程式時要保持這種心態：就好像將來要維護你這些程式的人是一位殘暴的精神病患者，而且他知道你住在哪

如果建築工人像工程師寫軟體那樣蓋房子，那第一隻飛來的啄木鳥就能毀掉人類文明
這世界最有可能毀滅的方式，大多數專家都同意，是由意外造成；這就是為什麼會有我們，我們是電腦專家，我們創造意外
我們這個產業有個特別奇怪的現象：我們不但不會從失敗裡吸取教訓，同時也不從成功中學習經驗

為什麼我們沒有時間把事情做對，卻總有時間把事情砍掉重練？
傻瓜都能寫出電腦能理解的程式，優秀的工程師寫出的是人類能讀懂的程式

程式除錯要比新編寫程式困難一倍，因此，如果你寫出了最聰明的程式，按此推算，你就缺乏更深遠的智慧來替它除錯
想在自己的程式裡找出一個錯誤是十分困難的；而當你認為你的程式沒有錯誤時，那就更難了

最好的性能改進是將軟體從不能用的狀態變成可用

證明所有大於 2 的奇數都是質數。數學家：3、5、7 是質數，由歸納法得證。物理學家：3、5、7 是質數，9 是實驗誤差，11 是質數⋯⋯ 工程師：3、5、7、9、11 都是質數。程式設計師：3、5、7、7、7、7⋯⋯
天文學家、物理學家和數學家在蘇格蘭的火車上。天文學家看到一隻黑羊：「蘇格蘭的羊是黑的！」物理學家：「只有部分蘇格蘭的羊是黑的。」數學家：「在蘇格蘭，此刻，至少存在一隻羊，從我們這側觀察是黑色的。」
數學家的妻子問：「我臉上的雀斑，你真的不介意嗎？」數學家溫柔地說：「怎麼會呢？我平時常跟小數點打交道。」
無限多個數學家走進一間酒吧。第一個點了一杯啤酒，第二個點半杯，第三個點四分之一杯。酒保倒了兩杯啤酒說：「你們應該知道自己的極限。」
為什麼雞要過莫比烏斯帶？為了走到同一邊。
π 是什麼？數學家：圓周率。工程師：大約 22/7。程式設計師：雙精度下是 3.141592653589。營養學家：派是一種好吃的甜點！
sin 問 cos：「今晚要 tan 還是 cot？」
有一天三次函數打電話給二次函數，三次函數一聽到就說：「喂喂喂」，然後二次函數就不見了。
為什麼女生拍照要在頭上比 ya？因為平方一定會變正。
函數和微分算子狹路相逢。微分算子說：「我要把你微分到等於零！」函數答：「來啊！我是 eˣ。」另一天同樣的函數遇到另一個微分算子。函數自信地說：「我是 eˣ！」微分算子笑道：「哈哈，我是 d/dy。」
Why can't you trust an atom? Because they make up everything.
A neutron walks into a bar and asks, 'How much for a drink?' The bartender replies, 'For you, no charge.'
Schrödinger's cat walks into a bar. And doesn't.
Heisenberg is pulled over for speeding. The cop asks, 'Do you know how fast you were going?' Heisenberg replies, 'No, but I know exactly where I am.'
Einstein developed a theory about space. And it was about time, too.
What's the most terrifying word in nuclear physics? 'Oops.'
Why is it best to teach physics on the edge of a cliff? Because that's where students have the most potential.
A photon checks into a hotel. The bellhop asks, 'Can I help you with your luggage?' The photon says, 'No thanks, I'm traveling light.'
Entropy isn't what it used to be.
A helium atom walks into a bar. The bartender says, 'We don't serve noble gases here.' The helium doesn't react.
Why did Heisenberg's wife leave him? Because whenever he had the energy, he didn't have the time.
What did one quantum physicist say to the other? 'I'm uncertain about the future.'
Gravity makes a terrible friend. It's always holding you down.
I would tell you a joke about the speed of light, but it would go over your head.
Two atoms are walking down the street. One says, 'I think I lost an electron.' The other asks, 'Are you sure?' 'I'm positive!'
What did the duck say to the physicist? 'Quark, quark, quark!'
A bar walks into a man... wait, that's a frame of reference joke.
Why did the physicist break up with the biologist? There was no chemistry.

Schrödinger and Heisenberg are driving. A cop pulls them over. 'Do you know how fast you were going?' 'No, but I know exactly where I am.' The cop searches the trunk and shouts, 'There's a dead cat in here!' Schrödinger says, 'Well, now there is.'
薛丁格的貓走進了一間酒吧。也沒有。
海森堡超速被攔，警察問：「你知道你開多快嗎？」海森堡：「不知道，但我精確地知道我在哪。」
一顆中子走進酒吧：「一杯啤酒多少錢？」酒保：「你免費。」
一顆光子辦理旅館入住。行李員問：「要幫你搬行李嗎？」光子：「不用，我旅行很輕。」
物理學最恐怖的一句話是什麼？「跟理論預測不一樣。」
在懸崖邊教物理最好，因為那裡的學生最有位能。
熵已經不是以前的熵了。
兩個原子在街上走。一個說：「我好像丟了一個電子。」另一個問：「你確定？」「我很正！」
I told a chemistry joke. There was no reaction.
Why are chemists great at solving problems? They have all the solutions.
What do you do with a sick chemist? If you can't helium, and you can't curium, you might as well barium.
A man goes to a bar and orders H2O. His friend says, 'I'll have H2O too.' His friend died.
What did the scientist say when he found two isotopes of helium? HeHe.
Gold walks into a bar. The bartender yells, 'AU, get out!'
What's irony? When something has the chemical symbol Fe.
Never trust an atom. They make up literally everything.
Why did the noble gas cry? Because all his friends argon.
If you're not part of the solution, you're part of the precipitate.
What did one tectonic plate say to the other when they bumped into each other? 'Sorry, my fault.'
What's a chemist's favorite thing to do at the beach? Getting a tan-ium.
Organic chemistry is difficult. Those who study it have alkynes of trouble.
What do you call an acid with an attitude? A-mean-oh acid.
Why do chemists enjoy working with ammonia? Because it's pretty basic stuff.
我講了一個化學笑話。沒有反應。
怎麼處理一個生病的化學家？如果你不能 helium（治癒他），也不能 curium（治療他），那就 barium（埋了他）。
金走進酒吧。酒保大喊：「Au，出去！」
如果你不是溶液的一部分，你就是沉澱的一部分。
為什麼惰性氣體哭了？因為他的朋友都 argon（are gone）了。
What did the cell say when his sister stepped on his toe? 'Mitosis!'
Why was the biology book so thick? It had a lot of cell-f improvement.
What did the DNA say to the other DNA? 'Do these genes make me look fat?'
How do you organize a space party? You planet.
What do biologists post on Instagram? Cell-fies.
Why did the biologist look forward to casual Fridays? He heard they could wear genes to work.
How does Juliet maintain a constant body temperature? Romeostasis.
Why are bacteria bad at math? Because they multiply by dividing.
What is a microbiologist's favorite travel destination? Germ-any.
The brain is the most outstanding organ. It works 24/7 from the day you're born, and doesn't stop until you're asked to speak in public.
細胞被踩到腳趾時說了什麼？「有絲分裂！」（Mitosis = My toe, sis）
DNA 對另一條 DNA 說：「這些基因讓我看起來胖嗎？」
為什麼細菌不會做數學？因為它們用分裂來相乘。
An economist is someone who didn't have enough personality to become an accountant.
Economists have predicted nine of the last five recessions.
Three econometricians went hunting and spotted a deer. The first one shot and missed to the left. The second shot and missed to the right. The third one shouted, 'We got it!'
If all economists were laid end to end, they still wouldn't reach a conclusion.

A physicist, a chemist, and an economist are stranded on a desert island with a can of food. The physicist says, 'Let's smash it open with a rock!' The chemist says, 'Let's heat it up until it pops!' The economist says, 'First, assume we have a can opener...'
I asked an economist for her phone number. She gave me an estimate.
How many economists does it take to change a lightbulb? None. If the government would just leave it alone, it would screw itself in.
Two economists walk past a Porsche showroom. One says, 'I want that car.' The other says, 'Obviously not.'
An economist is an expert who will know tomorrow why the things he predicted yesterday didn't happen today.
What's the difference between an economist and a confused old man? The confused old man has a Porsche.
In capitalism, man exploits man. In communism, it's the other way around.
GDP is like a bikini: what it reveals is interesting, but what it conceals is vital.
經濟學家成功預測了過去五次衰退中的九次。
如果把所有經濟學家首尾相連排成一條線，他們還是得不出結論。
物理學家、化學家和經濟學家漂流到荒島，只有一罐罐頭。物理學家：「用石頭砸開！」化學家：「加熱到爆開！」經濟學家：「首先，假設我們有一個開罐器⋯⋯」
經濟學家是一種明天就能告訴你為什麼昨天的預測今天沒有實現的專家。
GDP 像比基尼：露出來的部分有趣，遮住的部分才是關鍵。
資本主義是人剝削人，共產主義是反過來。
Is it solipsistic in here, or is it just me?
What did the solipsist say when asked why he was talking to himself? 'Who else would I talk to?'
Descartes walks into a bar. The bartender asks, 'Would you like a beer?' Descartes says, 'I think not.' He vanishes.

Jean-Paul Sartre is sitting at a café. The waitress says, 'Can I get you a coffee?' Sartre replies, 'I'd like a cup of coffee with no cream.' The waitress says, 'Sorry, we're out of cream. Can it be with no milk instead?'
How many Marxists does it take to change a lightbulb? None. The lightbulb contains the seeds of its own revolution.
The Barber Paradox: a barber shaves all those who do not shave themselves. Who shaves the barber? The barber just grows a beard.
A Freudian slip is when you say one thing but mean your mother.
What's a nihilist's favorite drink? Nothing.
Nietzsche: 'God is dead.' God: 'Nietzsche is dead.' The rest of us: 'Can we just have brunch?'
The problem with political jokes is that they sometimes get elected.
There are only two hard problems in distributed systems: 2. Exactly-once delivery. 1. Guaranteed order of messages. 2. Exactly-once delivery.
笛卡兒走進酒吧。酒保問：「要一杯啤酒嗎？」笛卡兒說：「我想不要。」他消失了。
沙特在咖啡廳。服務生問：「要一杯咖啡嗎？」沙特：「一杯不加奶油的咖啡。」服務生：「抱歉奶油用完了，不加牛奶可以嗎？」
這裡真的是唯我論嗎？還是只有我這樣覺得？
佛洛伊德式口誤就是你說了一件事但其實想說的是你媽。
虛無主義者最愛喝什麼？什麼都不要。
A dangling participle walks into a bar. Enjoying a cocktail and feeling good, the bartender smiles.
The past, present, and future walked into a bar. It was tense.
A synonym strolled into a tavern.
A comma splice walks into a bar, it has a drink and then leaves.
A run-on sentence walks into a bar it starts telling a joke and everyone laughs but the joke doesn't end and no one can tell where the punchline is because there are no periods.
What's the difference between a cat and a comma? A cat has claws at the end of its paws; a comma is a pause at the end of a clause.
Never leave an apostrophe where it's not needed.
I before E, except when your weird foreign neighbor Keith receives eight counterfeit beige sleighs from feisty caffeinated weightlifters.
Knock knock. Who's there? To. To who? It's 'to whom.'
The double negative walked into the bar but nobody didn't not notice.
Hyphenated. Non-hyphenated. The irony.
Let's eat, Grandma. Let's eat Grandma. Commas save lives.
過去式、現在式和未來式走進一間酒吧。氣氛很緊張。（It was tense.）
一個同義詞踱進了一家小酒館。
「來吃奶奶」和「來吃，奶奶」。標點符號救人一命。
How can you tell an extroverted engineer? They stare at YOUR shoes instead of their own.

An engineer, a physicist, and a mathematician are staying in a hotel. A fire starts. The engineer wakes up, fills the wastebasket with water, douses the fire, and goes back to sleep. The physicist wakes up, calculates the exact amount of water needed, fills the exact amount, and puts out the fire. The mathematician wakes up, sees the fire, sees the bucket, says 'A solution exists!' and goes back to sleep.
What's the difference between mechanical engineers and civil engineers? Mechanical engineers build weapons, civil engineers build targets.
Arguing with an engineer is like wrestling a pig in mud. Eventually, you realize the pig likes it.
An optimist sees the glass half full. A pessimist sees the glass half empty. An engineer sees the glass as twice as large as it needs to be.
Normal people believe if it ain't broke, don't fix it. Engineers believe if it ain't broke, it doesn't have enough features yet.
To the optimist, the glass is half-full. To the pessimist, the glass is half-empty. To the engineer, the glass has a 2x safety factor.
怎麼分辨外向的工程師？他們會盯著「你的」鞋子看。
樂觀主義者：杯子半滿。悲觀主義者：杯子半空。工程師：杯子的安全係數是 2 倍。
正常人覺得東西沒壞就別修。工程師覺得沒壞表示功能還不夠多。
Why did the sun go to school? To get a little brighter.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
What did the astronaut say when he crashed into the moon? 'I Apollo-gize.'
Why did the star go to school? Because it wanted to be a little brighter.
Saturn's name was going to be Best Planet, but it didn't have a ring to it. Wait, yes it does.
The rotation of Earth really makes my day.
Why can you never trust atoms? They make up everything in the universe.
How does the solar system hold up its pants? With an asteroid belt.
怎麼辦太空派對？你得先 planet（計畫 / 行星）。
地球的自轉真的讓我很開心。（make my day = 讓我開心 / 製造我的一天）
我正在讀一本關於反重力的書。它讓人放不下來。
Correlation doesn't imply causation, but it does waggle its eyebrows suggestively and gesture furtively while mouthing 'look over there.'
A statistician's spouse had twins. He was delighted. He called the minister to baptize them. The minister asked him the names. 'Name one of them Tom.' 'And the other?' 'We'll call him Control.'
Why did the data analyst break up with their spreadsheet? Too many unresolved arguments.
How did the random variable get into the club? Through the p-value.
The average human has one breast and one testicle.
Five out of four people have trouble with fractions.
A statistician can have their head in an oven and feet in ice and say that on average they feel fine.
I have a statistics joke, but it's not significant.
相關不代表因果，但它會一邊朝你擠眉弄眼一邊鬼鬼祟祟地比著「看那邊」。
統計學家的妻子生了雙胞胎。他很高興地叫牧師來取名。牧師問名字。「一個叫 Tom。」「另一個呢？」「叫 Control（對照組）。」
平均而言，人類有一個乳房和一個睪丸。
五分之四的人搞不懂分數。
